meaning: n.浼戝亣,鏆傛椂瑙ｉ泧,鏀惧亣vt.鍑嗗亣,鏆傛椂瑙ｉ泧
examples: This could mean a massive furlough of government workers.
I have a furlough every three years.
If the latter, the governor has even agreed to furlough himself.
The remaining scheduled furlough days are: June 14, July 5, July 22, and August 30.
The other scheduled furlough days are June 14, July 5, July 22 and August 30, 2013.
